description_long: This chair features a highly geometric and modern design, composed primarily of cylindrical and spherical forms. The seat is a thick, circular disc supported by three cylindrical legs, providing a stable base. A large cylindrical backrest spans the width of the chair, attached to the seat by a single vertical support. Notably, a prominent sphere is positioned on the seat near the backrest, serving as a unique decorative or functional element. Another large sphere, separate from the main structure, is placed adjacent to the chair, possibly as an accessory or footrest. The entire object is finished in a uniform, matte light gray color, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern chair with a circular seat, cylindrical backrest, and spherical decorative elements, all in matte light gray. The design is geometric and minimalist, with three cylindrical legs and a separate large sphere nearby.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular seat, cylindrical backrest, and a large sphere on the seat, with another large sphere in the foreground.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical backrest, the sphere on the seat, and the large sphere positioned to the left of the chair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the cylindrical backrest and the three supporting legs, with the sphere on the seat partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the cylindrical backrest, the sphere on the seat, and the large sphere now on the right side of the chair.
